title: erucastrum virgatum var. elatum
intro: Erucastrum virgatum var. elatum, also known as rocket cress or wild rocket, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Erucastrum virgatum var. elatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
